name: rejoinbi-platform
description: Operate Rejoin BI tenants, full admin configuration, workspaces, uploads, BI Studio, Data Engine, ECharts publishing, and safe production cleanup from Codex.

interface.shortDescription: Develop, publish, and administer Rejoin BI tenants
interface.longDescription: Helps Codex connect to Rejoin BI tenants, list workspaces, validate protected workspaces, upload app files, publish BI/ECharts projects, inventory BI Studio and Data Engine resources, automate platform/admin configuration including users, pages, permissions, RLS, announcements, platform title/logos/favicon/colors, messaging, Codex keys, system tools, upload gateway, and safely preview workspace/page cleanup using the platform API. If a user asks to see or change the title, use platform-title for the current browser title or set-platform-branding for full branding. Before any other action, validate a full tenant host and confirm authentication/permission.
defaultPrompt: Connect to my Rejoin BI tenant
Inventory BI Studio and Data Engine
